subcodes.first_line: God willing, through divine assistance, may ye be engaged in service to the Cause and walk with complete steadfastness amongst His servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله باعانت الهی بخدمت امر مشغول باشید و باستقامت تمام بین عباد مشی نمائید
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
